description: Legal document(s). In the hand of Ḥalfon ha-Levi b. Netanel (identification provided by Amir Ashur). It looks like there are portions of at least three distinct documents here. One is only a formulary (fulān instead of people's names). Another has to do with Yeḥezqel ha-Levi b. Netanel getting involved in the empty silk and dyeing workshop of al-Barqānīyya.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
